verbGlossary.MANAGED BY: {source} area is under the day-to-day construction management of this {target}
verbGlossary.OWNED BY: {source} is held by this {target} or developer who commissioned the construction work
verbGlossary.PERMITTED BY: Project site or right-of-way use is authorized through permits issued by this regulatory {target}
verbGlossary.REGULATED BY: {source} is enforced by this occupational safety {target}
verbGlossary.FINANCED BY: {source} is funded through draw schedules administered by this construction lender
verbGlossary.INSURED BY: Project site builder's risk or general liability coverage is underwritten by this insurance carrier
verbGlossary.CONNECTED BY: {source} are installed and activated by this utility {target}
verbGlossary.DESIGNED BY: {source} layout and {target}ural intent was created by this architect as the design professional of record
verbGlossary.ENGINEERED BY: {source} structural systems were analyzed, sized, and specified by this engineering {target}
verbGlossary.GRADED BY: Exterior zone earthwork and site grading was designed or executed by this civil engineering {target}
verbGlossary.LANDSCAPED BY: {source}planting design was specified by this landscape architecture {target}
verbGlossary.STOCKED BY: {source} receives and stores materials delivered by this {target} for project consumption
verbGlossary.TRENCHED BY: {source}is excavated for utility installation by or on behalf of this utility provider
verbGlossary.FURNISHED BY: Temporary facility trailers, fencing, or sanitation are supplied by this equipment rental {target}
verbGlossary.FRAMED BY: {source} level structural framing or trade-specific scope is installed by this {target}
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED BY: {source} level construction sequence and trade stacking is planned by this construction manager
verbGlossary.SURVEYED BY: {source} are investigated and characterized by this geotechnical engineering {target}
verbGlossary.INSPECTED BY: {source} is examined for code compliance or quality conformance by this special inspection agency
verbGlossary.ROUTED BY: {source} are designed and coordinated by this {target}
verbGlossary.RATED BY: {source} is specified by this fire protection engineering {target}
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED BY: {source} is reviewed and approved for code compliance by this {target}
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONED BY: {source}are functionally tested and verified by this commissioning agent
verbGlossary.SEALED BY: {source}firestop assembly is inspected and documented by this special inspection agency
verbGlossary.TESTED BY: {source}area waterproofing assembly is flood-tested or moisture-tested by this materials testing lab
verbGlossary.FABRICATED FOR: {source}receives a custom-built assembly or component manufactured by this {target}
verbGlossary.MOBILIZED BY: {source}is staffed and equipped by this self-performing division for direct-hire execution
verbGlossary.COORDINATED BY: Work zone trade sequencing and design integration is managed by this design-build {target}
verbGlossary.DETAILED BY: Wall surface thermal, moisture, and air barrier assemblies are specified by this building envelope {target}
verbGlossary.LAID OUT BY: {source} line intersections and control points are established from structural engineering documents by this {target}
verbGlossary.COUNTED AT: {source}count metric tallies the number of trade {target}s active at this project site
verbGlossary.MEASURED AT: {source}coverage rate calculates the percentage of floor levels with assigned {target}s
verbGlossary.TRACKED AT: {target} safety incident rate is monitored across all trades at this project site
verbGlossary.ATTRIBUTED TO: {source}-based defect density metric is allocated to this responsible {target}
verbGlossary.REPORTED TO: {source} is submitted to this regulatory {target} for compliance tracking
